Markdown body text check types › Single H1
--------------------------------------------
- kind: markdown_single_h1
- family: markdownBodyText
- scope: item
- severity: error
- purpose: Require that the markdown body contains at most one H1 heading.

Family context
--------------
Markdown body-text check types validate relationships between frontmatter metadata and markdown body content.

Configuration keys (0)
----------------------
- none

Example
-------
  collections:
    notes:
      path: notes
      checks:
        - kind: markdown_single_h1

Other markdown body text check types (6)
----------------------------------------
- markdown_code_fence_language_required
- markdown_no_heading_level_jumps
- markdown_required_section
- markdown_requires_h1
- markdown_title_matches_h1
- markdown_writing_tells
